<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Exception; /** * Lets value resolvers tell when an argument could be under their watch but failed to be resolved. * * Throwing this exception inside `ValueResolverInterface::resolve` does not interrupt the value resolvers chain. */ class NearMissValueResolverException extends \RuntimeException { }
